query:
INSERT INTO attendance (account_id, event_id, person_id, status, party_size, note)
               VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6)
               ON CONFLICT (event_id, person_id) DO UPDATE SET
                   status = excluded.status,
                   party_size = excluded.party_size,
                   note = excluded.note,
                   updated_at = datetime('now')
